description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a combination of black, blue, and gray panels. The shoes have a black toe cap and tongue, with gray side panels and a prominent blue stripe running along the sides. The laces are black and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the shoes have white rubber soles with visible text and logo details on the side and heel. The side of each shoe displays a circular emblem, while the heel features a small white icon. The overall construction suggests a mix of synthetic leather, fabric, and rubber, with a cushioned interior for comfort. The shoes appear clean, structurally intact, and suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A pair of low-top sneakers with black, blue, and gray panels, black laces, and white rubber soles, featuring side and heel logos. The shoes are clean and well-constructed, ideal for urban casual use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black toe caps, black laces, and the symmetrical design of both shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue side panel, gray stripe, circular side logo, and white sole with text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue heel section, black collar, and small white logo on each heel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue and gray side panels, circular logo, and white sole with visible text.
attribute_logo: Circular emblem on the side panel and small white icon on the heel; both are white on blue/gray backgrounds.
